use_cases: Collapsible content sections for FAQ pages or documentation sites
Expandable menu items in navigation sidebars or headers
Step-by-step wizards or guided tutorials with collapsible sections
Settings panels with grouped expandable options
ai_summary: A lightweight accordion component built on Radix UI primitives with smooth expand/collapse animations and chevron rotation. Supports keyboard navigation and hover states, exported as composable primitives (Accordion, AccordionItem, AccordionTrigger, AccordionContent) for flexible integration in any layout context.
